summary: Tested all 8 requested features for task and event management app fixes. All features are working correctly: SMM archive shows completed tasks from events, Events archive shows cancelled (red X) and past events (минула text), mobile event popup has sticky footer with all buttons visible.

ui_bugs.issue: Icon buttons computed height is 48px instead of specified 40px in CSS, though visually they appear square. This may be browser minimum touch target or line-height override.

passed_tests: Mobile SMM archive shows completed SMM tasks from events (11 restore buttons, 20 task items found)
Completed SMM tasks show event titles (BODYART LIGHT, ЧАЮВАННЯ |НЕ| САМОТНІХ)
Desktop archive has 3 columns: завдання, smm завдання, архів подій
Desktop SMM column shows completed SMM tasks from events
Mobile Events archive shows both cancelled and past events
Cancelled events in archive have red X icon (restore-btn.cancelled class)
Past events in archive show 'минула' text
Icon buttons in settings dialogs appear visually square (not stretched)
Mobile event popup has cancel button (скасувати) with orange styling (text-orange-600 border-orange-200)
Mobile event popup has delete button (видалити) with destructive styling
Mobile event popup has edit button (редагувати)
Mobile event popup footer is sticky (sticky bottom-0 bg-[#F5F5F0] class)
All buttons visible in mobile event popup footer
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: icon-btn CSS specifies height: 40px but browser computes 48px. Consider adding !important or checking for conflicting styles if exact 40px is required.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST PAST EVENT and TEST CANCELLED EVENT for archive testing, then deleted after verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 requested features verified: (1) Mobile SMM archive shows completed SMM tasks from events with restore buttons - WORKING, (2) Desktop archive SMM column shows completed SMM tasks - WORKING, (3) Mobile Events archive shows both cancelled and past events - WORKING, (4) Cancelled events have red X icon via restore-btn.cancelled class - WORKING, (5) Past events show 'минула' text - WORKING, (6) Icon buttons appear visually square - WORKING (though computed height is 48px vs 40px specified), (7) Mobile event popup has cancel (orange) and delete buttons - WORKING, (8) Mobile event popup footer is sticky with all buttons visible - WORKING
